parameters.command:
set -e
NOW="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
echo "ADMIN_START"
echo "checked_at=$NOW"
echo "--- GIT STATUS ---"
cd /root/.openclaw/workspace && git status --short || true
echo "--- DISK ---"
df -h / /root/.openclaw/workspace || true
echo "--- BACKUP FILES ---"
find /root/.openclaw/workspace -maxdepth 2 \( -name '*.skill' -o -name 'MEMORY.md' -o -name 'HEARTBEAT.md' -o -name 'docs' \) 2>/dev/null | head -n 40 || true
